LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT OGDEN CONTRACT INTERIORS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED ANY FACTS TO SHOW A CAUSAL LINK BETWEEN DEFENDANTS' ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATIONS REGARDING THE SAFETY OF HIS PERSONAL INFORMATION AND THE INDUSTRIAL INJURY HE SUFFERED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED THAT HE WAS EMPLOYED BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ESTABLISH ANY DUTY OWED TO HIM BY DEFENDANTS. THESE ALLEGATIONS ARE CONCLUSORY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: kendall m. burton, esq., 650.615.4860, for defendant ogden contract interiors, inc.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT OGDEN CONTRACT INTERIORS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained, without leave to amend. No opposition was filed. Plaintiff has not pled any facts to show a causal link between Defendants' alleged misrepresentations regarding the safety of his personal information and the industrial injury he suffered. Plaintiff has not alleged that he was employed by Defendants. Plaintiff has not alleged sufficient facts to establish any duty owed to him by Defendants. These allegations are conclusory. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Continued To Jun-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT OGDEN CONTRACT INTERIORS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to June 10, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. The Court does not have a copy of the pleading that is being challenged (i.e., the First Amended Complaint). Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the pleadings to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 24, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
